name: devopsflow
description: DevOpsFlow engineering workflow and agent harness for Codex, combining skills, hooks, MCP integration, specialized agents, execution constraints, and feedback loops.

interface.shortDescription: Engineering workflow and agent harness for Codex
interface.longDescription: DevOpsFlow combines composable skills, hooks, MCP integration, specialized agents, and an agent harness for engineering request routing, DDD modeling, TDD handoff, planning, execution, debugging, review, verification, and branch finishing.
